query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A monochrome photograph showing vertical and diagonal bands of bright illumination alternating with deep shadow, converging toward the upper portion of the frame. Two prominent bright streaks run through the center-left and center-right, separated by a broad dark vertical band, while additional dark forms occupy the left and right edges of the composition.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract black and white photograph rendered with intentional blur and extreme soft focus, where subjects dissolve into smooth gradients lacking fine detail or texture. Radiating beams of blown-out highlights contrast against crushed black shadows, abandoning representational clarity in favor of pure tonal abstraction and graphic simplification.
